targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp_ms, temperature_c FROM iot_readings ORDER BY timestamp_ms
SELECT timestamp_ms, humidity_pct FROM iot_readings ORDER BY timestamp_ms
SELECT timestamp_ms, pressure_hpa FROM iot_readings ORDER BY timestamp_ms
SELECT timestamp_ms, mq135_ppm FROM iot_readings ORDER BY timestamp_ms
SELECT timestamp_ms, water_level FROM iot_readings ORDER BY timestamp_ms
SELECT timestamp_ms, rain_intensity FROM iot_readings ORDER BY timestamp_ms
SELECT timestamp_ms, battery_v FROM iot_readings ORDER BY timestamp_ms
SELECT latitude AS lat, longitude AS lon FROM iot_readings ORDER BY timestamp_ms DESC LIMIT 1
